frame_analyses.description: VirtaMed simulator showing fallopian tube anatomy with left and right isthmuses. Blue marking visible on left tube indicating coagulation target area
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Virtual reality surgical training environment, not FLS task setup

frame_analyses.description: Bipolar KELLY grasper approaching left isthmus marked area. Second instrument visible for retraction
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Appropriate instrument selection for bipolar coagulation

frame_analyses.description: Bipolar grasper engaged on left fallopian tube at marked location. Coagulation appears to be in progress
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper tissue grasping for effective coagulation

frame_analyses.description: Continued bipolar coagulation of left isthmus. Tissue whitening visible indicating effective thermal effect
Transition phase, instruments repositioning. Task header shows 'Retract right adnexa'
Uterine manipulator visible, preparing for right-sided coagulation. Right tube now in focus
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper use of uterine manipulation for exposure

frame_analyses.description: Instruments approaching right fallopian tube. Blue marking visible on right isthmus target area
Interface showing instrument selection menu with bipolar KELLY grasper and scissors options
Bipolar grasper positioned on right fallopian tube at marked coagulation site
Active coagulation of right isthmus. Tissue blanching visible indicating effective thermal coagulation
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Appropriate energy application and tissue response

frame_analyses.description: Coagulation effect visible on right tube. 'COAG' indicator visible on interface
Final documentation phase showing bilateral fallopian tubes with coagulation marks visible
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper documentation of completed bilateral procedure

task_specific_assessments.error_message: This video shows a VirtaMed simulator tubal sterilization procedure, not a standard FLS task. The FLS (Fundamentals of Laparoscopic Surgery) consists of 5 specific tasks: peg transfer, pattern cutting, endoloop, extracorporeal suture, and intracorporeal suture. This appears to be a gynecologic surgery training module.

score_components.formula_applied: Not applicable - this is not an FLS task

confidence_rationale: Clear visual identification of VirtaMed simulator interface and tubal sterilization procedure. Text overlays confirm this is 'Tubal Sterilization - Bipolar Coagulation' training, not FLS assessment.
cannot_determine: FLS scoring metrics - this is not an FLS task
technique_summary: This video demonstrates a virtual reality training session for tubal sterilization using bipolar coagulation, performed on a VirtaMed simulator. The procedure shows systematic bilateral coagulation of fallopian tube isthmuses with appropriate instrument selection and technique.
strengths: Proper use of uterine manipulation for exposure
improvement_suggestions: This assessment cannot provide FLS-specific improvement suggestions as this is not an FLS task
For gynecologic surgery training, consider timing efficiency between bilateral procedures
